def positive_typeddict_unchecked_access():
    rule_id = "typeddict_unchecked_access"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Direct indexing of optional TypedDict keys without an obvious guard path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
